offline.banner: You're offline. Some features may be unavailable.

loading.title: Preparing your sign-in
loading.subtitle: Checking the app version, consent, and profile before opening Hrayem.

login.title: Welcome back
login.subtitle: Sign in so your games and profile stay synced across devices.

qa.title: QA login
qa.description: Dev builds only. These buttons use real seeded QA accounts and must never appear in preview or production.

register.title: Create your account
register.subtitle: Enter your email and password. You'll finish your profile before entering the app.
register.confirmEmail: Check your email for the confirmation link, then sign in and we'll finish sync.

forgotPassword.title: Reset your password
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link.
forgotPassword.info: If you have an account, the email should arrive within a minute. Check spam too.
forgotPassword.sent: A password reset link was sent to your email.

resetPassword.title: Set a new password
resetPassword.subtitle: Choose a new password to finish the recovery flow.

reconsent.title: Please review the latest terms
reconsent.subtitle: Hrayem needs your consent for the current Terms of Service and Privacy Policy before you continue.

profileSetup.title: Finish your profile
profileSetup.subtitle: Add the basics now so other players can recognize you in events, chat, and player lists.
profileSetup.photoHelp: Helps others recognize you. A square photo works best.
profileSetup.photoPermissionDenied: Photo library access is needed to choose a profile picture.

forceUpdate.title: Update required
forceUpdate.subtitle: A new version of Hrayem is available. Please update to continue.

launchError.title: We couldn't finish app startup
launchError.subtitle: Please try again. If the problem keeps happening, restart the app once your connection is stable.

profileError.title: We couldn't load your profile
profileError.subtitle: Please try again. Your account is signed in, but the profile data is still needed before the app can continue.

consentError.title: We couldn't load your consent status
consentError.subtitle: Please try again so Hrayem can verify your current terms acceptance.

validation.password: Enter a password with at least 6 characters.
validation.acceptTerms: You need to accept the Terms of Service and Privacy Policy.
validation.city: Choose one of the supported cities.

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.invalidCredentials: That email or password is incorrect.
errors.emailNotConfirmed: Please confirm your email before signing in.
errors.userAlreadyExists: An account with this email already exists.
errors.oauthCancelled: The sign-in flow was cancelled before completion.
errors.rateLimited: Too many attempts. Please wait a moment and try again.
errors.network: You're offline. Check your connection and try again.
errors.callback: The sign-in callback could not be completed. Please try again.
errors.pushToken: Push notifications could not be registered on this device.
errors.logoutFailed: We couldn't finish logout cleanly. Please try again.

auth.sessionExpired: Your session expired. Please log in again.
auth.passwordRecoveryReady: Set a new password to finish your recovery flow.
auth.logoutPartial: You were logged out on this device. Remote cleanup may take a moment.

greetings.explore: Take a look at what's being played today.
greetings.nearby: The closest open games are just below.
greetings.pickup: One free hour can turn into a game.
greetings.matchDay: See which nearby games are filling up.

hero.noCityBody: As soon as you set your city, Hrayem will show games and players around you.
hero.feedReadyBody_one: There is {{count}} open game nearby right now. If it fits, just open the detail and join in.
hero.feedReadyBody_other: There are {{count}} open games nearby right now. If one fits, just open the detail and join in.
hero.emptyFilteredBody: Try a different sport or time window. New games will appear here as soon as they are added.
hero.emptyOpenBody: As soon as a new game appears, you'll see it here first. In the meantime, you can let other players know you're free.

feed.title: Open games
feed.emptyBodyDefault: No games {{period}} yet. Be the first — create one and players will join.
feed.emptyBodyFiltered: We don't see a game for this filter set right now. Be the first — create one and players will join.
feed.noMoreGamesBody: Your closest game is already highlighted above. New nearby games will appear here as they are added.

players.teaserBody_one: {{count}} player is free in this time window.
players.teaserBody_other: {{count}} players are free in this time window.
players.teaserEmpty: No one has posted availability here yet.
players.sectionSubtitle: Players who are free in the selected time range.
players.emptyBody: Try a different date or be the first to post your availability.

foundation.title: Project foundation is ready
foundation.subtitle: This screen verifies the shared client infrastructure before product features begin.
foundation.sentrySent: A Sentry test error was sent.
foundation.sessionExpired: Your session expired. Please log in again.
foundation.errorFallbackBody: The foundation screen hit an unexpected error.

home.title: Home feed
home.subtitle: See the best matches in your city and open the details in one tap.

upcoming.title: Upcoming games
upcoming.placeholder: This stub matches the final home feed position. Real event cards, filters, and pagination land in Milestone 4.
upcoming.secondaryPlaceholder: Upcoming games is the default home tab, and foreground refresh now reuses the shared React Query focus wiring.

availablePlayers.title: Available players
availablePlayers.placeholder: This stub reserves the passive-matchmaking surface for players who post availability in the current city.
availablePlayers.secondaryPlaceholder: The tab, title, and layout are final here, while the real availability list and actions arrive in Milestone 6.

eventDetail.title: Event detail
eventDetail.subtitle: Review the venue, organizer, and confirmed players, then share the game link from the final detail route.
eventDetail.placeholder: This screen reserves the final event detail route while Milestone 4 adds real event data, sharing, and venue fields.

chat.title: Chat
chat.subtitle: The chat route exists in the shell so event detail and My Games can already target it safely.
chat.placeholder: Realtime messages, message history, and read-only states arrive in later milestones.

createEvent.title: Create event
createEvent.subtitle: Pick the sport, time, and venue, then publish the game in a minute.
createEvent.placeholder: The form will add sport, date, time, venue, player count, and game level.

addVenue.title: Add venue
addVenue.subtitle: This modal route is reserved for the venue-creation step from the create-event flow.
addVenue.placeholder: Venue search and crowdsourced venue creation arrive in Milestone 4.

skillLevel.title: Skill level
skillLevel.subtitle: Players choose their level for a specific sport here.
skillLevel.placeholder: The level picker appears when event creation or joining needs it.

myGames.title: My games
myGames.subtitle: Keep upcoming plans in view and return to finished games for quick post-game follow-up.
myGames.upcomingPlaceholder: This section will list games you organize or joined once the event data flow is implemented.
myGames.errorTitle: We couldn't load your upcoming games
myGames.errorBody: Please try again. If the problem keeps happening, check your connection and reopen My Games once you're back online.
myGames.emptyBody: Once you create or confirm a game, it will appear here in date order.
myGames.pastPlaceholder: This section will later host no-show reporting and thumbs-up prompts for completed events.
myGames.pastErrorTitle: We couldn't load your past games
myGames.pastErrorBody: Please try again. If the problem keeps happening, check your connection and reopen Past once you're back online.
myGames.pastEmptyBody: Once one of your games finishes, it will move here for post-game follow-up.
myGames.reportNoShowBody: The organizer can still report a no-show for {{remaining}}.
myGames.thumbsUpBody: You can still send post-game feedback for {{remaining}}.
myGames.thumbsUpEmpty: No remaining confirmed players need feedback here.

profile.title: Profile
profile.subtitle: Keep your stats, skill levels, and favorite players in one place.

settings.title: Settings
settings.placeholder: Notification preferences and editable app settings stay stubbed until their milestone work begins.

accountDeletion.title: Delete account
accountDeletion.subtitle: This route reserves the App Store-required account deletion flow before the destructive backend work lands.
accountDeletion.placeholder: The irreversible delete-account flow is intentionally left as a stub until its backend effects are implemented.

playerProfile.title: Player profile
playerProfile.subtitle: This snippet route is ready for event-detail and availability navigation.
playerProfile.placeholder: Player stats, thumbs-up indicators, and reporting actions arrive in later milestones.

postAvailability.title: Post availability
postAvailability.subtitle: Let other players know when you have time to play.
postAvailability.placeholder: The form for sport, dates, and time preference will be added later.

profile.statsSubtitle: Your levels and match history update here as you keep playing.
profile.statsEmpty: Add or finish more games to build your sport stats here.
profile.connectionsSubtitle: Players you clicked with most show up here for the next invite.
profile.connectionsEmpty: Players you click with most will appear here after finished games.
profile.skillEditHint: Tap to update your level for this sport.
profile.skillModalSubtitle: Update your current level for this sport so future games use the right expectations.
profile.skillUpdateFailed: Your skill level could not be updated. Please try again.

errors.stats: We couldn't load your sport stats right now.
errors.connections: We couldn't load your play-again connections right now.

stats.thumbsHidden: Thumbs-up percentage unlocks after at least 3 finished games.

playerProfile.title: Player
playerProfile.subtitle: Review this player's visible sport stats and shared play-again signals.
playerProfile.statsSubtitle: Visible levels and finished-game signals appear here.
playerProfile.empty: This player has no visible sport stats yet.
playerProfile.inviteUnavailableBody: Directly inviting a specific player is not wired in the app yet. For now, share the link after creating a game.
playerProfile.messageUnavailableTitle: Private chat is not available yet
playerProfile.messageUnavailableBody: Hrayem chat currently lives inside a confirmed game, not as direct messages between players.
playerProfile.sharedEmpty: You do not have any finished games together yet.

errors.summary: We couldn't load this player's profile summary right now.
errors.stats: We couldn't load this player's sport stats right now.
errors.sharedGames: We couldn't load your shared games with this player right now.

settings.accountSubtitle: Session and privacy-sensitive actions live here.
settings.profileSaveFailed: We couldn't save your app preferences right now.
settings.profileSaveFailedNetwork: You're offline. Reconnect and try saving your app preferences again.
settings.photoSaveFailed: We couldn't save your profile photo right now.
settings.photoPermissionDenied: Photo library access is needed to choose a profile picture.

validation.city: Choose one of the supported cities.

account.deleteSubtitle: Permanently delete your account and related data.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.permissionBody: Hrayem uses push notifications for event joins, confirmations, reminders, chat, and cancellations. You can change these preferences at any time.
notifications.permissionInlineBody: Device status: {{status}}. Enabled types may not arrive without permission.
notifications.permissionReady: Push notifications are ready on this device.
notifications.permissionUnavailable: Notifications are still unavailable on this device right now.
notifications.permissionDenied: Notifications are turned off for Hrayem on this device.
notifications.permissionFailed: We couldn't update push notification permissions right now.
notifications.loadFailed: We couldn't load your notification preferences right now.
notifications.saveFailed: We couldn't save your notification preferences right now.
notifications.toggleHint: Toggle this notification type on or off

types.player_removed: I was removed from an event

availability.title: I'm available
availability.subtitle: Share your next free slots so nearby players can build the right game around you.
availability.errorBody: Please try again. If the problem keeps happening, check your connection and reopen this tab once you're back online.
availability.emptyBody: Be the first to post your availability for this city and date range.
availability.notePlaceholder: Anything others should know before they create a game around this availability?
availability.saveFailed: We couldn't save your availability right now.
availability.skillRequired: Choose your skill level for this sport before posting availability.
availability.skillModalSubtitle: We need your current level for this sport before Hrayem can show your availability to other players.
availability.skillSaveFailed: We couldn't save your skill level right now.
availability.deleteFailed: We couldn't delete that availability right now.
availability.loadFailed: We couldn't load your current availability right now.
availability.cityRequired: Choose your city in the profile before posting availability.

validation.startDate: The first available day must be today or later.
validation.endDate: The end of the range must stay on or after the start date.
validation.rangeLimit: Availability can only be posted up to 7 days ahead.

errors.generic: Something went wrong while handling this event. Please try again.
errors.rateLimited: You're moving a bit too fast. Please wait a moment and try again.

feed.errorBody: Please try again. If the problem keeps happening, check your connection and reopen the feed once you're back online.
feed.emptyBody: No games matched this filter set. Be the first to create one.

detail.loadingSubtitle: Fetching the latest venue, organizer, and player details for this game.
detail.errorSubtitle: The event detail route is ready, but this game could not be loaded right now.
detail.errorBody: Please try again. If the link is old or the event was removed, this detail may no longer be available.
detail.skillRangeNote: Players outside the selected level can still join. This is mostly here to set expectations before the game.
detail.noDescription: No extra notes were added for this game.
detail.thumbsUpPercentageHidden: Thumbs-up percentage unlocks after at least 3 finished games.
detail.confirmedPlayersEmpty: No confirmed players are visible yet beyond the organizer.
detail.shareMessage: {{sport}} at {{venue}} on {{date}} — join me on Hrayem! {{url}}

state.joinBody: Tap below to claim a confirmed spot if one is still open.
state.joinWaitlistBody: This game is currently full. New joins will go onto the waitlist in FIFO order.
state.organizerBody: Organizers stay confirmed automatically and can manage this game from here.
state.confirmedBody: You're in. If your plans change before the game starts, leave here and the waitlist will promote automatically.
state.waitlistedBody: If a confirmed player leaves, the first waitlisted player is promoted automatically.
state.cancelledBody: The organizer cancelled this game. Join, leave, and organizer actions are now closed.
state.finishedBody: This game already ended, so organizer and join actions are no longer available.
state.closedTitle: This game is no longer open
state.closedBody: Join and leave actions are only available while the game is still upcoming and active.

chat.errorBody: Please try again. If the event link is old or your access changed, the chat may no longer be available.
chat.forbiddenBody: Only the organizer and confirmed players can open this event chat.
chat.cancelledBanner: This event was cancelled. Chat is read-only.
chat.messagesErrorTitle: We couldn't load the latest messages
chat.messagesErrorBody: Please try again. If the problem keeps happening, check your connection and reopen the chat once you're back online.
chat.emptyBody: Say hi to the group once you're ready.
chat.inputHelper: Confirmed players and the organizer can message here.

validation.bodyRequired: Write a message before sending it.
validation.bodyLength: Messages must stay between 1 and 1000 characters.

errors.forbidden: Only the organizer and confirmed players can access this chat.
errors.validation: Your message needs another look before it can be sent.
errors.rateLimited: You're sending messages too quickly. Please wait a moment.
errors.generic: We couldn't send that message right now. Please try again.

venueDetail.errorBody: The venue detail is ready, but the latest data could not be loaded right now.
venueDetail.navigationUnavailableBody: Please try again, or open the address manually in your maps app.
venueDetail.reserveUnavailableBody: Hrayem cannot reserve courts directly at venues yet. Use the game detail to coordinate, or contact the venue outside the app.
venueDetail.sportsUnavailableBody: We do not have open games at this venue yet, so sports cannot be inferred.
venueDetail.menuBody: Venue reporting and management will come later. For now, we only show data the app already knows safely.
venueDetail.openGamesErrorBody: Please try again. If the issue persists, check your connection.
venueDetail.openGamesEmptyBody: We do not see any open games at this venue in the next two days.

join.skillRequired: Choose your skill level for this sport before joining this game.
join.skillModalSubtitle: We need your current level for this sport before Hrayem can join the game for you.
join.successWaitlisted: You're on the waitlist for this game.
join.warningBody: This game is set for {{range}} players. Your level is {{level}}. You can still join, but the organizer set this range to find players at a similar level. Continue?

errors.unavailable: This game is no longer open for new joins.
errors.organizerCannotJoin: The organizer cannot join their own game.

errors.unavailable: This game can no longer be left from the app.
errors.organizerCannotLeave: The organizer cannot leave their own game.

hero.title: Let's play.
hero.subtitle: Pick the sport, time, and venue. We'll help you find players automatically.

create.skillHelper: This range helps players quickly gauge the level of the game. Joining outside it is still allowed.
create.skillSummaryEmpty: Tap the level that fits you. A second tap can widen the range.
create.skillSummarySingle: This game is mainly aimed at {{level}} players.
create.skillSummaryRange: This game is open to players from {{min}} to {{max}}.
create.descriptionPlaceholder: Optional note about format, level, or what players should bring.
create.successBody: Everything is ready. Invite players and get excited for a great game.
create.skillRequired: Choose your skill level for this sport before the event can be created.

noteSuggestionBodies.tips: Try to arrive at least 10 minutes early.
noteSuggestionBodies.parking: Parking is closest to the main entrance.

errors.validation: The event details need another look before they can be sent.

sections.sportDescription: Choose what you want to play.
sections.scheduleDescription: Start date and time. You can adjust the end manually or use a quick duration.
sections.venueDescription: Choose a venue. We only show places in your selected city.
sections.skillDescription: Tap the level that fits the game. A second tap can widen the range.
sections.detailsDescription: Optional note and the final polish before publishing.

validation.skillRange: The minimum level must be lower than or equal to the maximum level.
validation.endTime: The end time must be later than the start time.
validation.futureStart: The game must start in the future.

edit.title: Edit event
edit.subtitle: Fine-tune the time, venue, and player count before the game starts.
edit.loadingBody: We're filling the current event values into the form now.
edit.sportLocked: Sport stays locked after creation so player stats and event history remain consistent.

errors.validation: The updated event details need another look before they can be saved.
errors.playerCountTooLow: You can't reduce the total player count below the number of confirmed players already in the game.
errors.unavailable: This event can no longer be edited from the app.
errors.unavailableBody: Only the organizer can edit an upcoming active game.

venue.noMatch: No matching venue was found in your city yet.

errors.missing: The selected venue could not be found anymore.
errors.cityRequired: Choose your city in the profile before adding a new venue.

skillLevel.modalSubtitle: We need your current level for this sport before Hrayem can create the game.

description.1: I'm just starting out or I play casually.
description.2: I play regularly and know the fundamentals well.
description.3: I'm competitive and comfortable in strong games.
description.4: I compete seriously or play at tournament level.

errors.saveFailed: Your skill level could not be saved. Please try again.

organizerTools.title: Organizer tools
organizerTools.body: Keep the game up to date and cancel it before it starts if plans change.

errors.forbidden: Only the organizer can use these event controls.

cancel.confirmBody: Confirmed and waitlisted players will be notified right away, and the chat will become read-only.

errors.unavailable: This game can no longer be cancelled from the app.

removePlayer.success: The player was removed from this game.
removePlayer.confirmBody: {{player}} will be removed from this game. If someone is on the waitlist, the first player will be promoted automatically.

noShow.title: No-show reporting
noShow.body: You can still report a confirmed player as a no-show for {{remaining}}.
noShow.confirmBody: {{player}} will receive a no-show on their sport profile for this finished game.
noShow.noneLeft: No remaining confirmed players can be reported here.
noShow.minimumPlayersBody: No-show reporting only unlocks when at least two confirmed non-organizer players were in this game.
noShow.organizerOnly: Only the organizer can report no-shows during the post-game window.
noShow.closedBody: The no-show window for this game is already closed.

errors.unavailable: No-show reporting is no longer available for this game.
errors.alreadyReported: This player was already reported as a no-show for this game.

thumbsUp.title: Who would you play with again?
thumbsUp.body: You can still send post-game feedback for {{remaining}}.
thumbsUp.empty: No remaining confirmed players need feedback here.
thumbsUp.closedBody: The post-game feedback window for this game is already closed.

errors.unavailable: Post-game feedback is no longer available for this game.
errors.alreadyGiven: You've already sent thumbs up for this player in this game.

reports.title: Submit a report
reports.eventBody: Tell us what went wrong with {{target}}. Reports go to the Hrayem team for manual review.
reports.playerBody: Tell us what went wrong with {{target}}. Reports go to the Hrayem team for manual review.
reports.detailHint: Add a short explanation for the Hrayem team
reports.detailPlaceholder: Add any context that will help us review this report.
reports.detailPlaceholderOther: Describe the issue in your own words.
reports.success: Thanks. Your report was sent for review.

validation.detail: Keep the report detail under 300 characters.

errors.rateLimited: You're sending reports too quickly right now. Please wait a moment.
errors.targetUnavailable: This target is no longer available to report.
errors.validation: Please review the report details and try again.
errors.network: You're offline. Reconnect and try sending the report again.
errors.generic: We couldn't send this report right now. Please try again.

accountDeletion.title: Delete account
accountDeletion.subtitle: Remove your Hrayem account and clean up the future event data tied to it.
accountDeletion.body: Deleting your account is permanent. Hrayem will cancel your future organized games, remove you from future joined games, and clean up the profile data that can safely be removed.
accountDeletion.confirmBody: This permanently deletes your Hrayem account and cleans up your future event participation.

errors.unauthorized: Your session expired. Please log in again before deleting your account.
errors.network: You're offline. Reconnect and try deleting your account again.
errors.generic: We couldn't delete your account right now. Please try again.

impacts.organizedEvents: Future games you organize will be cancelled and affected players will be notified.
impacts.joinedEvents: You'll be removed from future games you joined, and waitlisted players can be promoted.
impacts.availability: Your active availability posts will be removed.
impacts.profilePhoto: Your uploaded profile photo will be deleted from storage.
impacts.sessions: This device will be signed out and your push token will be cleared.
impacts.history: Past chat, reports, no-show, and thumbs-up history stays intact with your user references anonymized.

publicFallback.loadingSubtitle: Preparing the event details for this link.
publicFallback.loadingBody: If you already have Hrayem installed, you can also open the event directly in the app.
publicFallback.errorSubtitle: We couldn't load the shared event right now.
publicFallback.errorBody: The event may have been removed, or this link is no longer active.
publicFallback.detailSubtitle: Event details for players opening this link without the app.
publicFallback.chatSubtitle: This chat belongs to a Hrayem event. Install the app to open the conversation.
publicFallback.detailBody: Download Hrayem to join {{sport}} games, manage your RSVP, and chat with players.
publicFallback.chatBody: Download Hrayem to open the event chat, see the latest messages, and join future games.
publicFallback.openInAppHint: Try opening this event in the Hrayem app
